revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-2-115

A casing that encloses the crankshaft and connecting rods in some types of reciprocating engines or air-compressors,

It is usually filled with lubricating oil.

{{IALAFooter}}
